ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, bus) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State where the driver's license was issued */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driving_experience" INTEGER /* Driving experience in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for the trip */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who made the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the trip */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the trip */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., highway, urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip to which the GPS data belongs */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the GPS location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the GPS location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the GPS location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the GPS location */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing of the vehicle at the GPS location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obd_data" (
  "obd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OBD data point */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip to which the OBD data belongs */,
  "engine_load" REAL /* Engine load at the time of OBD data collection */,
  "engine_rpm" REAL /* Engine RPM at the time of OBD data collection */,
  "fuel_flow_rate" REAL /* Fuel flow rate at the time of OBD data collection */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level at the time of OBD data collection */,
  "coolant_temperature" REAL /* Coolant temperature at the time of OBD data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obd_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data point */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip to which the sensor data belongs */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration at the time of sensor data collection */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration at the time of sensor data collection */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration at the time of sensor data collection */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope reading at the time of sensor data collection */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope reading at the time of sensor data collection */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope reading at the time of sensor data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_data" (
  "emissions_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions data point */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip to which the emissions data belongs */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions at the time of emissions data collection */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption at the time of emissions data collection */,
  "nox_emissions" REAL /* NOx emissions at the time of emissions data collection */,
  "pm_emissions" REAL /* Particulate matter emissions at the time of emissions data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emissions_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being requested */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time of request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., data export, data analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being exported */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Time of export */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle configuration */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle to which the configuration belongs */,
  "configuration_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., engine, transmission) */,
  "configuration_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "configuration_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the configuration value (e.g., liters, horsepower) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_configurations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver profile */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver to which the profile belongs */,
  "profile_type" TEXT /* Type of profile (e.g., driving style, preferences) */,
  "profile_value" TEXT /* Value of the profile */,
  "profile_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the profile value (e.g., kilometers, miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_profiles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle to which the maintenance record belongs */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle to which the insurance record belongs */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "insurance_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the insurance policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_insurance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver to which the license record belongs */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State where the license was issued */,
  "license_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_licenses_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle to which the registration record belongs */,
  "registration_plate" TEXT /* Registration plate number */,
  "registration_state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is registered */,
  "registration_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_registrations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
